title: V&T Statement Schema
description: Schema for Verification and Truth statements used in C-RSP contracts and acceptance criteria.

what.description: What was evaluated or produced. Describes the artifact or action under review.

principles_active.description: Which constitutional principles were active during evaluation.

true.description: What is true — verified, present, confirmed facts. Existence checks that passed.

assumed.description: What was assumed but not verified. Assumptions that underpin the work.

uncertain.description: What is uncertain — known unknowns or areas where confidence is partial.

unverified.description: What remains unverified. These are open claims that require future evidence.

not_claimed.description: Explicit statements of what is NOT being claimed. Guards against over-reading.

functional_status.description: Current functional state of the artifact or system. EXISTS, PARTIAL, BROKEN, NOT_BUILT.

governance_state.description: Governance lifecycle state of the item bearing this V&T statement.

evidence_ref.description: Path or ID of the evidence log entry that supports the true and verified claims.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this V&T statement was written.

evaluator.description: Who or what produced this V&T statement (human role or AI tool ID).
